analysis: Agent 0 and Agent 1 failed due to syntax errors and undefined variables respectively. Agent 2 succeeded with a greedy algorithm approach. Agent 3 failed due to an LLM unreachable error. The best solution so far uses a greedy algorithm.

assignments.direction: Implement a genetic algorithm for job scheduling.
Apply simulated annealing to minimize tardiness in job scheduling.
Refine the greedy algorithm approach to improve performance.
Experiment with particle swarm optimization to find optimal job schedules.
